strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and multiple languages
Hands-on AI agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, Vitest-era tooling, workshops on testing)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is older (robotic arms, ~2016-2018)
Cloud/containerization signal is light — Docker/Kubernetes mentioned briefly, no clear AWS/GCP/Azure depth beyond AWS CDK at Optilyz

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
Missing Nest.js and current Kotlin experience

response.justification: Candidate brings well over the required 6 years of full-stack experience with a strong match on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, plus directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling work that aligns with internal automation tooling goals. Testing discipline, multi-language fluency, and architecture exposure are clear strengths. Gaps are around explicit Nest.js use and current Kotlin/Java practice, and cloud/Kubernetes depth is only lightly evidenced in the resume.
